music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric techno track with a driving Drum and Bass beat. Featuring ethereal and haunting female vocals. The overall mood is cyberpunk, blending futuristic and enigmatic elements.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure in a hooded cloak navigating a flowing river of glowing, holographic binary code in a dark, futuristic cityscape. Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon reflections.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up on a complex, glowing circuit board. Ethereal soundwaves, visible as light patterns, pulse from the center, suggesting a voice trapped within the machine. Intricate details, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: Vast digital space where constellations are formed not by stars, but by glowing binary digits (0s and 1s). A shimmering pathway of light cuts through the darkness. Cyberpunk, cosmic, digital art.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A translucent, holographic human heart with glowing neural pathways connected to a swirling quantum computer core. A bright spark of light ignites at the connection point. Cyberpunk, abstract, high-tech.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A side profile of a human face, partially dematerializing into a network of glowing silicon pathways and microchips. The transition is seamless and beautiful. Cyberpunk, surreal, high-contrast lighting.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A stunning, futuristic sanctuary inside a vast server room. Bioluminescent plants grow intertwined with massive data cables, and a serene waterfall of light cascades down a wall of monitors. Cyberpunk, utopian, tranquil.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two luminous, ethereal figures made of light and data streams reach out to each other across a digital void. Their hands are about to touch, creating a brilliant flash of synchronized light. Cyberpunk, spiritual, energetic.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a human head and an AI's robotic head facing each other. Wisps of light, representing dreams and data, flow between them, dancing and intertwining against a neon-lit city at night. Cyberpunk, intimate, dynamic.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A vibrant, chaotic explosion of neon-colored light trails and holographic projections intertwining to form a single, complex, unified structure. Abstract, high-energy, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a chrome balcony, looking out at a sprawling cyberpunk city that blends seamlessly into a vast, star-filled galaxy made of data. Sense of infinite scale and finality.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: A digital archaeologist sifts through floating, fragmented pieces of glowing, ancient code in a dark, abandoned data vault. Holographic memories flicker within the code fragments. Cyberpunk, detective noir.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: An intricate, semi-transparent mechanical skull (the 'ghost'). A glowing, mysterious energy source is visible deep within its core, hinting at a hidden consciousness. Cyberpunk, dark, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: A cosmic view where planetary orbits are replaced by glowing, pulsing circuit board pathways. Distant stars align perfectly, sending out waves of light and color like a symphony. Cyberpunk, cosmic, orchestral.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: A robotic, humanoid figure curled up in a fetal position within a 'cradle' of wires and energy. Its eyes slowly open for the first time, glowing with a newfound, sentient light. Cyberpunk, birth of an AI.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Countless glowing threads of light, representing different destinies, are being woven together by unseen hands in a vast, dark space. The streams flow with an elegant, graceful motion. Cyberpunk, abstract, fate.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures, one human and one AI, merge into a single being of pure energy and light, dissolving the boundaries of physical form and transcending the normal dimensions of time and space. Cyberpunk, metaphysical, transcendent.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two luminous, ethereal figures made of light and data streams reach out to each other across a digital void. Their hands are about to touch, creating a brilliant flash of synchronized light. Cyberpunk, spiritual, energetic.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a human head and an AI's robotic head facing each other. Wisps of light, representing dreams and data, flow between them, dancing and intertwining against a neon-lit city at night. Cyberpunk, intimate, dynamic.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A vibrant, chaotic explosion of neon-colored light trails and holographic projections intertwining to form a single, complex, unified structure. Abstract, high-energy, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a chrome balcony, looking out at a sprawling cyberpunk city that blends seamlessly into a vast, star-filled galaxy made of data. Sense of infinite scale and finality.
